# Pinned commits for external benchmark baselines.
#
# external/ itself is gitignored apart from this manifest; the listed
# libraries are vendored locally on the developer's machine for the
# benchmark comparison and never tracked in the parent repo.
#
# To reproduce a baseline benchmark run, clone each library into the
# named directory and `git checkout` the listed commit, e.g.:
#
#     git clone <url> external/<name>
#     git -C external/<name> checkout <commit>
#
# Format: <name> <url> <pinned commit>

cuCollections https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuCollections.git d4e84ee20b9185a3aa279ce184416bd41e53287f
warpcore      https://github.com/sleeepyjack/warpcore.git  1a2fe03d438e8dfa1dbd8d9da73f183bd2d72051
